titleStmt.title: SII 26.364: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 364. (A.R. No. 343 of 1909.) KŪVAM, TIRUVALLORE TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: The last part of the inscription is missing.

This inscription records a gift of a nandā lamp to the temple of the god Tiruviṟkōlamuḍaiyār of Kūvam alias Tiyāgasamudranallūr in Maṇaviṟ-kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam by Śaṅgambai, wife of Tumbūraṉ Tiruvaraṅga- muḍaiyāṉ of the same place. To provide for this a sum of 15 Aṉṟāḍu Narpaḻaṅkāśu was endowed by her from the month of Appaśi of the year, which was received by the temple Śivabrāhmaṇas, viz. Kauśikaṉ Śenneṟpeṟṟāṉ, Gautamaṉ Uḍaiyappiḷḷai, Gautamaṉ Tiruvalamuḍaiyāṉ, Kāśyapaṉ Dēvappiḷḷai, and Bhāradvāji Ka(Ga)ṇapati-bhaṭṭaṉ who had agreed to burn the lamp for ever.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīrā
jātirājadevaṟkku yāṇṭu Eḻāvatu
jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu maṇavi
ṟ koṭṭattu kūvamāṉa tiyākacamuttiranallū
r Āḷuṭaiyār tiruviṟkolamuṭaiyāṟku Ivvūr
tumpūraṉ tiruvaraṅkamuṭaiyān Akamuṭaiyāḷ
caṅkampai vaitta tirununtāviḷakku 1 Oṉṟukkum Ikko
yivil śivabrāhmaṇar kauśikaṉ cenneṟpeṟṟāṉum gauta
maṉ Uṭaiyapiḷḷaiyum gautamaṉ tiruvalamuṭaiyā
ṉum kāśya(ya)paṉ tevappiḷḷaiyum bhāradvāji kaṇapatibha
ṭṭaṉum Ivvāṇṭu Appaci māśattu Ivvaṉaivomuṅ kai
kkoṇṭa Aṉṟāṭu naṟpaḻaṅkācu 10 5 Ikkācu patinaintu
m poliyūṭṭāka kaikkoṇṭu Ittirunantāviḷakku Oṉ
ṟum cantrādityavarai celuttakkaṭavomāṉom Iv
vaṉaivom Ippaṭikku Ivai kauśikaṉ cenne
(na)ṟpeṟṟān Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai gautamanIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 26.364 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
